sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79296" key="parekstrofh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεκ-στροφή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79296.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turning towards</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">π. προσώπων</foreign>, oflovers, Malch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.394D.</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
